changes.description: Initial skill rewrite: replaced nano-pdf CLI-focused skill with comprehensive PyPDF2-based instructions covering text extraction, merging, page counts, metadata extraction, and JSON output. Added explicit procedures and code examples for SLM guidance.

Added CRITICAL warning about never using PDF metadata for author/title extraction (metadata shows 'anonymous'/'untitled'). Added explicit procedure to extract from page text instead. Strengthened rules against using pdftk/pdftotext. Result was inconsistent (100 then 75 on merge task).

Packed critical instructions into the skill description field (visible in system prompt) since qwen3.5-122b cannot reliably load skill bodies via <load-skill> mechanism. Description now contains: use PyPDF2, never use PDF metadata for authors, extract from page text. Confirmed stable with 2 runs: all 100/100.

key_insight: qwen3.5-122b cannot load skill bodies via the <load-skill> text mechanism (it tries to call load-skill as a tool). Critical instructions must be embedded in the description field, which is always visible in the system prompt.
